ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the football club */,
  "stadium" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium */,
  "league" INTEGER /* League in which the club competes */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the club owner */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the club's official website */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_stadium FOREIGN KEY ("stadium") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "renovated_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was last renovated */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface (e.g., grass, artificial) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the stadium's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the league (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league operates */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "promoted_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams promoted to a higher league */,
  "relegated_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams relegated to a lower league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club */,
  "ability" REAL /* Performance rating of the club */,
  "crowd" INTEGER /* Average crowd attendance */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the club */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the club */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (games without conceding a goal) */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing club */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of fans attending the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fan */,
  "attendance_count" INTEGER /* Number of games attended */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the fan */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the fan */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the fan */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the fan */,
  "last_attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last game attended by the fan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of fans attending the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of fans from the home team */,
  "away_team_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of fans from the away team */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., jersey, training, stadium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)
